arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs. Sevilla: Los Blancos receive defensive injury boost for final match of 2024
arts.sum: Real Madrid welcome French defender Ferland Mendy back into their squad for Sunday's La Liga clash with Sevilla at Bernabeu.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti confirms Real Madrid star is being tested in new position
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has confirmed that he and his staff are currently testing defender Raúl Asencio out in a new role. Asencio, of course, enjoyed nothing short…

arts.ttl: Juventus’ Dusan Vlahovic reveals personal gift from Real Madrid star
arts.sum: The latest social media activity on the part of Juventus star Dusan Vlahovic has turned heads in Spain this weekend. This comes after the Serbian international unveiled a personalised gift…

arts.ttl: Training ground photo hands Real Madrid fans a reason to smile
arts.sum: A photo stemming from the training ground of La Liga giants Real Madrid is no doubt set to give rise to a collective smile across the club’s fanbase on Saturday.…

arts.ttl: ‘Mbappé has finished settling in…’ – Carlo Ancelotti is convinced the Frenchman is now at his best for Real Madrid
arts.sum: There has been plenty of criticism of Kylian Mbappé since he made the move from Paris to Madrid in the summer. Much of it is justified, the Frenchman hasn’t been…

arts.ttl: Team News: Real Madrid vs. Sevilla injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's La Liga clash between Real Madrid and Sevilla.

arts.ttl: Official: Real Madrid name squad to face Sevilla
arts.sum: The panel of players set to be depended upon by Real Madrid to get the better of Sevilla on Sunday has this afternoon been unveiled. Real, of course, are primed…

arts.ttl: Inter scout Nico Paz, but Real Madrid ready to activate clause – report
arts.sum: According to Tuttosport newspaper, Inter have set their sights on Nico Paz, but Real Madrid...

arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for La Liga match against Sevilla
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their squad list for Sunday’s match against Sevilla. Ancelotti could either deploy an extra midfielder and move Bellingham to the center of the attacking line with Mbappe playing on the left or play Brahim on the right flank.

arts.ttl: What did Ancelotti say about Kylian Mbappé‘s “adaptation period” at Real Madrid?
arts.sum: It’s been an exhausting year for the coach who by early evening tomorrow, will have given 114 press conferences during the past 12 months and faced over 1,150 questions. Real Madrid bring the year to a close at home to Sevilla, who have slipped into the lower half of the table after winning just four of their last 10 league games.
